schema.description: Hong Kong public bus information service providing real-time arrival times, route planning, stop information, and route discovery across the Hong Kong bus network.

tools.name: get_next_bus
tools.description: Retrieve the next estimated arrival time for a specific bus route at a designated stop, including distance and timing information.

route.description: The bus route number identifier (e.g., '1A', '6', '960') for which to retrieve arrival information.

stop_name.description: The name of the bus stop where the arrival time should be checked.

direction.description: The route direction indicator (e.g., 'to Tsim Sha Tsui', 'to Central'). Required when the route operates in multiple directions to disambiguate the service.

estimated_arrival_time.description: The estimated time when the next bus will arrive at the specified stop, typically in ISO 8601 format or minutes remaining.

distance_from_stop.description: The current distance of the approaching bus from the stop, measured in kilometers or meters.

tools.name: find_buses_to_destination
tools.description: Discover all bus routes that serve a specified destination, optionally filtered by an origin location for point-to-point route planning.

destination.description: The destination location name to search for (e.g., 'Central', 'Mong Kok', 'Airport').

origin.description: The origin location name. When provided, filters results to show only routes traveling from the origin to the destination.

routes.description: Collection of bus routes that can reach the specified destination.

route_name.description: The descriptive name of the bus route, typically indicating the origin and destination terminals.

tools.name: get_route_stops_info
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive information about all stops along a specified bus route, including their sequence and names.

route.description: The bus route number identifier (e.g., '1A', '6', '960') for which to retrieve stop information.

direction.description: The route direction indicator. Required when the route operates in multiple directions to specify which service direction to query.

stops.description: Ordered list of all bus stops along the specified route.

stop_order.description: The sequential position of this stop along the route, starting from the origin terminal.

stop_name.description: The name of the bus stop.

tools.name: find_stop_by_name
tools.description: Search for bus stops by full or partial name matching, returning detailed information about each matching stop.

stop_name.description: Full or partial name of the bus stop to search for. Supports fuzzy matching to find stops with similar names.

stops.description: Collection of bus stops matching the search criteria.

stop_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the bus stop in the Hong Kong bus system.

stop_name.description: The name of the bus stop.

location.description: Geographic location information for the bus stop.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the bus stop location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the bus stop location.

tools.name: get_all_routes_at_stop
tools.description: Retrieve all bus routes that service a specified bus stop, including route numbers, names, and directions.

stop_name.description: The name of the bus stop for which to retrieve all servicing routes.

routes.description: Collection of all bus routes that pass through the specified stop.

route_name.description: The descriptive name of the bus route, typically indicating the origin and destination terminals.

direction.description: The route direction indicator for this service at the stop (e.g., 'to Tsim Sha Tsui', 'to Central').

tools.name: get_bus_eta
tools.description: Retrieve multiple estimated arrival times for a specified bus route at a stop, showing the next several buses approaching.

route.description: The bus route number identifier (e.g., '1A', '6', '960') for which to retrieve arrival times.

stop_name.description: The name of the bus stop where arrival times should be checked.

direction.description: The route direction indicator. Required when the route operates in multiple directions to specify which service to query.

count.description: The number of upcoming bus arrivals to retrieve. Defaults to 3 if not specified, allowing users to see multiple approaching buses.

arrivals.description: Ordered list of upcoming bus arrivals, from soonest to latest.

estimated_arrival_time.description: The estimated time when this bus will arrive at the specified stop, typically in ISO 8601 format or minutes remaining.

distance_from_stop.description: The current distance of this approaching bus from the stop, measured in kilometers or meters.

tools.name: search_route_by_stops
tools.description: Find available bus routes connecting two specific stops, including direct routes and transfer options for journey planning.

from_stop_name.description: The name of the origin bus stop where the journey begins.

to_stop_name.description: The name of the destination bus stop where the journey ends.

routes.description: Collection of available bus routes connecting the origin to the destination.

transfer_information.description: Details about any required transfers, including intermediate stops and connecting routes. Empty if the route is direct.

is_direct.description: Indicates whether this is a direct route (true) or requires transfers (false).

transfer_stops.description: List of stops where transfers are required.

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with 2 stops and 1 route connecting them, testing fundamental route lookup and stop information
Moderate scenario with 4 stops, 2 bidirectional routes, multiple arrivals, and transfer connections
Complex scenario with 6 stops, 3 routes with multiple directions, comprehensive arrival data, and multiple transfer options
Boundary case with empty collections and extreme coordinate values at valid limits

test_cases.description: Valid case with direction specified
Valid case without direction (should fail to find arrival)
test_cases.output: Expected error: No arrival information found
test_cases.note: Tool correctly requires direction to match arrival data

test_cases.output: Validation error: Route must be a non-empty string

Valid case - Route 6 at Tsim Sha Tsui (2 arrivals)
Valid case - Route 9 at Jordan MTR (1 arrival available)

test_cases.description: Valid case - Route with transfer from Tsim Sha Tsui to Prince Edward

save_scenario.details: Saved scenario matches original scenario data exactly. All state variables preserved correctly including stops, routes, route_stops, stop_routes, bus_arrivals, and route_connections.
